// About Me

The Developer Behind the Code

Senior Android Developer with 5+ years crafting scalable, reliable mobile applications. My core expertise spans Kotlin & Java with modern Android patterns — Jetpack Compose, MVVM, and Clean Architecture.

I go beyond standard app development — with hands-on experience in API security analysis, performance profiling, and reverse engineering using tools like Frida, Ghidra, and Burp Suite.

I am also a government-certified trainer for the Tamil Nadu Skill Development Corporation (Naan Mudhalvan Programme), mentoring the next generation of Android developers.

Professional Experience

Jun 2024 – Nov 2025 · Coimbatore
Android Developer
Cloudi5 Technologies

  • Implemented Firebase Cloud Messaging and WorkManager for reliable background processing
Mar 2023 – Apr 2024 · Coimbatore
Android Developer
Datasense Technologies

  • Reduced production crash rates by ~15% through memory optimization and profiling
  • Implemented secure authentication flows using OAuth and JWT
  • Collaborated in Agile and Scrum development environments
Jul 2022 – Jan 2023 · Coimbatore
Junior Android Developer
Infinit Solutions

  • Integrated Google Maps API for location-based services

Comgen India Software Solutions Pvt. Ltd.

Sandvik – Interactive Product Catalogue

Tamalou – Real-Time Group Chat

QB365 – Education Platform

06 · FinTech
Finvesta – All-in-One Financial Services

08 · E-Commerce
LiveOrder – Reliance Products
E-commerce style B2B order management app for Reliance products. Features role-based access, product catalog, order placement, invoicing, and delivery tracking.

09 · Security / Oman
Falcon – CCTV Surveillance (Oman)
CCTV camera purchasing and installation management app for Oman customers. Includes customer onboarding, installation scheduling, Bank Dhofar payment gateway, and live CCTV monitoring via NetDevSDK.
MVCXMLJavaRetrofitBank Dhofar PGNetDevSDK
GitHub
10 · IoT / Dairy
Nano Instruments – VLCC (Dairy Collection)
Village Level Collection Center app. Connects via ESP32 Bluetooth to milk analyzers to read fat, SNF, temperature & water content. Offline-first with auto-sync to server when online. SQLite local storage.
MVCXMLJavaRetrofitSQLiteESP32 BLEOffline-First
GitHub
11 · IoT / Dairy
Nano Instruments – Chilling Center
Regional milk chilling center management app. Receives milk from multiple VLCC villages, performs analyzer checks via Bluetooth, manages chilling operations with offline-first SQLite sync.
MVCXMLJavaRetrofitSQLiteBLEOffline-First
